$comment: Phase 1 Context Engine output schema. propertyOrdering required for Gemini 2.0 Flash.

intent.description: ADCES7-mapped intent. escalation_only for dose-change, diagnosis, Tier3/4. general_dsmes as catch-all.

context_sufficient.description: True=proceed to Phase 2. False=ask clarifying question first. Always true for QDS1,2,5 and escalation_only.

format.description: buttons=2-3 options. list=4-10 options. open=free text.

options.description: Empty [] for open. Max 3 for buttons (WhatsApp limit). Max 10 for list.

diabetes_type.description: Empty string if not mentioned. suspected = sugar is high but no formal diagnosis.

medications_mentioned.description: Controlled vocab only. oral_antidiabetic_unspecified for unknown tablet. insulin_basal for night/long-acting injection. statin_unspecified for cholesterol tablet.

insulin_user.description: True if patient mentions injection or insulin. Once true, never reset to false.

condition_flags.description: Permanent flags. Trigger Tier 2 sources. Never removed once set.

complications_mentioned.description: Controlled vocab only. foot_wound_present also triggers Tier 3 in Risk Engine. erectile_dysfunction_mentioned is stored but NEVER surfaced in patient responses.

location_hint.description: City or district in Kerala if mentioned. Empty string if not.

session_context.description: self=patient asking about themselves. family_member_inquiry=asking about a relative.

mid_clarification_resolved.description: True if this message answers a clarifying question from the previous bot turn. When true, context_sufficient must also be true.
